cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.15)

project(dls_messages)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0048 NEW)

list(APPEND CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake")

add_compile_options("-std=c++2a")


# ================================== Messages =================================
# create a dls_message library. Then link to this library all the libraries generated by idls_messages. This way we can link to dls_message and get all the messages.
include(generate_msg_library)
set (LIBRARY_NAME dls_messages)

add_library(${LIBRARY_NAME} SHARED)

# iterate over all the idl files that are in the idls directory. Extract the name of the idl and the subdirectory where the idl is located.
file(GLOB_RECURSE idl_files CONFIGURE_DEPENDS
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/idls/*.idl"
)

# generate msg files using fastddsgen
foreach(idl_file IN LISTS idl_files)
    fastddsgen_trigger(${idl_file})
endforeach()

# Create a custom target that depends on all the fastddsgen targets, so that we can wait for all the generated files to be created before building the cpp and python libraries.
add_custom_target(dls_messages_fastddsgen_all
    DEPENDS ${DLS_MESSAGES_FASTDDSGEN_TARGETS}
)
add_dependencies(${LIBRARY_NAME}
    dls_messages_fastddsgen_all
)

# add cpp generated files to the LIBRARY_NAME library and create python bindings for the generated cpp files
foreach(idl_file IN LISTS idl_files)
    generate_msg_library(${idl_file} ${LIBRARY_NAME})
    get_property(CPP_LIBRARY_NAME GLOBAL PROPERTY CPP_LIBRARY_NAME)
endforeach()

target_include_directories(${LIBRARY_NAME}
    PUBLIC
        $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/include>
        $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/include/dls_messages/dds/ros2_interface>
        $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:/usr/include>
        $<INSTALL_INTERFACE:/usr/include/dls_messages/dds/ros2_interface>
)
target_link_libraries(${LIBRARY_NAME}
    PUBLIC
        fastcdr
        fastdds
)

# if dls_install is not found, download dls2 and take dls_install from the cmake folder of dls2
if(NOT COMMAND dls_install)
    message(STATUS "dls_install not found — fetching dls2 cmake modules from GitHub...")
    include(FetchContent)
    FetchContent_Declare(
        dls2_cmake
        GIT_REPOSITORY    https://github.com/iit-DLSLab/dls2.git
        GIT_TAG           main
        GIT_SHALLOW       TRUE
        GIT_SUBMODULES    ""   # we only need the cmake/ folder — skip all submodules
    )
    FetchContent_GetProperties(dls2_cmake)
    if(NOT dls2_cmake_POPULATED)
        message(STATUS "Cloning dls2 (shallow) from https://github.com/iit-DLSLab/dls2.git ...")
        FetchContent_Populate(dls2_cmake)
        message(STATUS "dls2 cmake modules fetched to: ${dls2_cmake_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake")
    endif()
    list(APPEND CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "${dls2_cmake_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake")
    include(dls_options)
    include(dls_deploy)
    message(STATUS "dls_install loaded from fetched dls2.")
endif()

# dls_install(${LIBRARY_NAME})

include(CMakePackageConfigHelpers)
configure_package_config_file(
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/dls_messagesConfig.cmake.in
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/dls_messagesConfig.cmake
    INSTALL_DESTINATION /usr/lib/cmake/dls_messages
    NO_SET_AND_CHECK_MACRO
    NO_CHECK_REQUIRED_COMPONENTS_MACRO
)
install(FILES
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/dls_messagesConfig.cmake
    DESTINATION /usr/lib/cmake/dls_messages
    COMPONENT dls_messages_dev
)

install(
    DIRECTORY
		${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/cmake/
    DESTINATION
		/usr/include/${LIBRARY_NAME}/cmake
	COMPONENT
		dls_messages_dev
)

install(TARGETS ${LIBRARY_NAME}
    EXPORT dls_messagesTargets
    LIBRARY
        DESTINATION /usr/lib
        COMPONENT dls_messages_dev
    ARCHIVE
        DESTINATION /usr/lib
        COMPONENT dls_messages_dev
    RUNTIME
        DESTINATION ${DLS_INSTALL_RUNTIME_DIR}
        COMPONENT dls_messages_dev
)
install(
    EXPORT dls_messagesTargets
    FILE dls_messagesTargets.cmake
    NAMESPACE dls_messages::
    DESTINATION /usr/lib/cmake/dls_messages
    COMPONENT dls_messages_dev
)
install(
    DIRECTORY
        ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/include/${LIBRARY_NAME}
    DESTINATION
        /usr/include/
    COMPONENT
        dls_messages_dev
)

set(CPACK_PACKAGE_VERSION_MAJOR         ${PROJECT_VERSION_MAJOR})
set(CPACK_PACKAGE_VERSION_MINOR         ${PROJECT_VERSION_MINOR})
set(CPACK_PACKAGE_VERSION_PATCH         ${PROJECT_VERSION_PATCH})
set(CPACK_DEBIAN_PACKAGE_VERSION        ${PROJECT_VERSION})
set(CPACK_PACKAGE_VENDOR                "dlslab")
set(CPACK_PACKAGE_CONTACT               "dlslab")
set(CPACK_DEBIAN_PACKAGE_MAINTAINER     "dlslab")
set(CPACK_VERBATIM_VARIABLES            ON)
set(CPACK_GENERATOR                     "DEB")
set(CPACK_DEB_COMPONENT_INSTALL         ON)
set(CPACK_PACKAGE_NAME 					"dls_messages_dev")
set(CPACK_PACKAGE_DESCRIPTION_SUMMARY 	"dls_messages_dev")
set(CPACK_DEBIAN_PACKAGE_SHLIBDEPS      ON)

set(CPACK_DEBIAN_DLS_MESSAGES_PACKAGE_NAME          "dls-messages" CACHE INTERNAL "")
set(CPACK_DEBIAN_DLS_MESSAGES_FILE_NAME             "dls-messages-${PROJECT_VERSION}.deb" CACHE INTERNAL "")  
set(CPACK_DEBIAN_DLS_MESSAGES_PACKAGE_DEPENDS       "" CACHE INTERNAL "")
set(CPACK_DEBIAN_DLS_MESSAGES_PACKAGE_SHLIBDEPS     ON)

set(CPACK_DEBIAN_DLS_MESSAGES_DEV_PACKAGE_NAME      "dls-messages-dev" CACHE INTERNAL "")
set(CPACK_DEBIAN_DLS_MESSAGES_DEV_FILE_NAME         "dls-messages-dev-${PROJECT_VERSION}.deb" CACHE INTERNAL "")  
set(CPACK_DEBIAN_DLS_MESSAGES_DEV_PACKAGE_DEPENDS   "" CACHE INTERNAL "")
set(CPACK_DEBIAN_DLS_MESSAGES_DEV_PACKAGE_SHLIBDEPS ON)

get_cmake_property(CPACK_COMPONENTS_ALL COMPONENTS)
list(REMOVE_ITEM CPACK_COMPONENTS_ALL "Unspecified")

include(CPack)
